main.description: A vote (up or down) on a forum subject (topic or comment). Uses a deterministic rkey derived from the subject URI (client convention: hashRkey('vote', subjectUri)) so each user has at most one vote per subject and re-voting toggles direction idempotently. Vote counts are reconstructed via Constellation backlinks on '.subject.uri'.

subject.description: The topic or comment being voted on. Discovery path: '.subject.uri'.
